leadText: Screen Cleaner (Japanese: バリアフリー Barrier-Free) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Galarian Mr. Mime and Mr. Rime.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Screen Cleaner is sent out, the effects of Light Screen , Reflect , and Aurora Veil end on both sides of the field. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Screen Cleaner has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Screen Cleaner is sent out, the effects of Light Screen , Reflect , and Aurora Veil end on both sides of the field.
